title: ANC - Switch from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode
scenario: Verify ANC switches OFF and its sub-setting is greyed out when Transparency Mode is turned ON in Device Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency Mode
Ensure ANC is currently ON (either Adaptive or Standard mode selected)
Tap on Transparency Mode to turn it ON
Observe the ANC toggle and mode selection options
expected: Transparency Mode is turned ON with Environment selected by default. ANC switches OFF and its previously selected value (Adaptive or Standard) is disabled/greyed out.
